name: Bluetooth Password → Set
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) for setting the bluetooth password.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: The password to set. Case sensitive. Must be exactly 6 characters long. Default password is `HiLink`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [Ld2410](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ld2410/) component to set.
